title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 57.270 - Powers of deputies
text:
57.270.  Powers of deputies. — Every deputy sheriff shall possess all the powers and may perform any of the duties prescribed by law to be performed by the sheriff.
(RSMo 1939 § 13134) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11514; 1919 § 11638; 1909 § 11209
